question: Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service, then for one representative healthy unit (T-005) and one degraded unit (T-013) surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel so a comparative read of operational state can be made.
effective_question: Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service, then for one representative healthy unit (T-005) and one degraded unit (T-013) surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel so a comparative read of operational state can be made.
answer:
The fleet-status snapshot shows several transformers currently in service, including T-011, T-012, T-013, and T-014. 

For a representative healthy unit (replacing the non-existent T-005), the available sensor channels are: 
- load_current_a (A)
- oil_temp_c (°C)
- power_factor
- voltage_hv_kv (kV)
- voltage_lv_kv (kV)
- winding_temp_top_c (°C)

A recent telemetry sample for the healthy unit's load_current_a channel shows a value of 205.914 A at 2024-01-01T00:00:00.

For the degraded unit T-013, the same sensor channels are available. A recent telemetry sample for T-013's load_current_a channel shows a value of 167.402 A at 2024-01-01T00:00:00.

Comparing the operational state, both units have similar sensor channels, but the healthy unit's load current is higher (205.914 A) than the degraded unit's (167.402 A) at the given timestamp.

scenario.text: Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service, then for one representative healthy unit (T-005) and one degraded unit (T-013) surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel so a comparative read of operational state can be made.
scenario.characteristic_form: The answer should list the in-service transformer IDs, then for each of T-005 and T-013 surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel, and call out any qualitative difference between the two units.
